11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieval combines text and vector signals:"}]
12:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"score = (vector_similarity * 0.5) + \n      (fts_rank * 0.3) + \n      (temporal_proximity * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}]

15:["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic entries are created during sleep consolidation, not directly by the agent:"}]
16:["$","$L29",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  WM[Working Memory] -->|age > TTL/2| C{Consolidation}\n  C -->|group by source| G[Group entries]\n  G -->|summarize| S[LLM or AAAK summary]\n  S -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|evict originals| DEL[Evict from Working]\n"}]

19:["$","p",null,{"children":["Episodic entries are grouped by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," for chronological recall:"]}]
